name: now-playing
description: Show the currently playing media (MPRIS) in the VSCode status bar.

nowPlaying.format.description: Status bar format. Placeholders: {playerIcon}, {artist}, {title}, {album}, {position}, {length}, {player}, {status}. {playerIcon} resolves the player-specific icon; {position} and {length} render as mm:ss (h:mm:ss when over one hour).

nowPlaying.maxLength.description: Max characters before truncation with ellipsis.

nowPlaying.priority.description: Status bar priority (higher = further from edges).

nowPlaying.showControls.description: Show separate prev/play-pause/next status bar buttons.

nowPlaying.preferredPlayer.description: Preferred MPRIS player suffix (e.g. 'spotify'). Empty = first available.

nowPlaying.sidecarPath.description: Path to the now-playing binary. Empty = use bundled binary.

nowPlaying.hidePausedAfterSeconds.description: Hide the status bar after the player has been paused for this many seconds. 0 disables.

nowPlaying.hideIdleAfterSeconds.description: Hide the status bar after the player has been stopped (or otherwise idle) for this many seconds. 0 disables.

when.description: Field-to-regex map (case-insensitive). All listed fields must match. Allowed fields: title, artist, album, player, status.

format.description: Template string used when this rule fires. Same placeholders as nowPlaying.format.

nowPlaying.formatRules.description: Ordered list of override rules. First match wins; the rule's format replaces nowPlaying.format. Example: [{"when":{"title":"Netflix"},"format":"Netflix"}].

nowPlaying.marquee.enabled.description: Scroll the status bar text as a marquee when it exceeds nowPlaying.maxLength, instead of truncating with an ellipsis.

nowPlaying.marquee.speedMs.description: Milliseconds between marquee shifts (lower = faster scroll).

nowPlaying.marquee.pauseEndsMs.description: Milliseconds to pause when the marquee wraps back to the start.

nowPlaying.marquee.gap.description: Separator inserted between end and start of the marquee loop.

nowPlaying.playerIcons.description: Override or extend the built-in player-to-icon map used by the {playerIcon} format token. Keys are MPRIS bus suffixes (e.g. 'spotify', 'firefox'); values are codicon strings like '$(music)'. Merged over the built-in defaults.
